name: Restrict Allowed Standard Headers
description: Allow only the headers <cstdio>, <cstring>, <iostream>, <cmath>, and <string>. Headers already present in the template are allowed.
reason: 题目要求（README.md 140-145 行）：**IMPORTANT**: In this assignment, you are only allowed to use the following five C++ standard library headers (unless provided in the starter code): `<cstdio>`, `<cstring>`, `<iostream>`, `<cmath>`, `<string>`. If you need other functionality, please implement it yourself.

name: Restrict Modifications - Keep Helper Headers Unchanged
description: Confirm exceptions.hpp and utility.hpp match the provided helpers.
reason: 题目要求（README.md 125 行）：**`exceptions.hpp`** and **`utility.hpp`**: Auxiliary files (**DO NOT MODIFY**). These provide exception handling classes and the pair class.

name: Readability of list.hpp
description: Assess whether comments, naming, and structure in list.hpp are clear and readable.
